title: Nicu Ionita
text: Home * People * Nicu Ionita Nicu Ionita [1] Nicu Ionita , an Austrian computer scientist, open source and chess programmer, who shortly after he discovered the world of chess engines, begun to work on his own engine in purely functional programming . He is now author of the UCI compliant open source chess engines Abulafia [2] and Barbarossa [3] , and of chessNet to connect chess engines to an UCI compatible GUI via TCP/IP [4] , all written in Haskell .
